Author: GitHub
Title: The Download: Copilot SDK, Claude Mythos, AI models are protecting each other & more
Description:
Welcome back to another episode of The Download! This week, we cover the severe supply chain attack on the Axios npm package and explore how AI models are spontaneously protecting each other. We are also excited to announce that the GitHub Copilot SDK is now in public preview and the Copilot CLI supports local models. Plus, learn about Claude Mythos finding decades-old vulnerabilities and Milla Jovovich's viral AI memory tool. Drop a comment to let us know which story surprised you the most!

#DevNews #GitHubCopilot #GitHub

— CHAPTERS —

00:00 Welcome to The Download 00:32 Axios package hijacked in supply chain attack 01:45 MCP gets enterprise-ready with security roadmap 02:58 GitHub Universe 2026 call for speakers 03:38 GitHub Copilot SDK hits public preview 04:34 Copilot CLI supports BYOK and local models 05:07 Anthropic's Claude Mythos takes on cybersecurity 06:21 AI models are protecting each other 07:28 Milla Jovovich's MemPalace AI tool goes viral 08:44 Outro

— RESOURCES —

• Universe call for sessions open:

GitHub Universe 2026 is making its return to San Francisco on October 28–29 — and if you've got something worth saying, the Call for Speakers is open now through May 1st. Get your proposal in before the clock runs out. https://reg.githubuniverse.com/flow/github/universe26/cfs/page/cfs-landing • MCP maintainers from top companies lay out enterprise security roadmap at Dev Summit https://thenewstack.io/mcp-maintainers-enterprise-roadmap/ • Axios Postmortem https://github.com/axios/axios/issues/10636 • Copilot SDK in public preview https://github.blog/changelog/2026-04-02-copilot-sdk-in-public-preview/ • Copilot CLI now supports BYOK and local models https://github.blog/changelog/2026-04-07-copilot-cli-now-supports-byok-and-local-models/ • Bizarre Study: AI Models Protecting Each Other https://metodoviral.com/en/news/ai-agents-protect-each-other-research-says/ https://rdi.berkeley.edu/blog/peer-preservation/ Anthropic’s Claude Mythos & Project Glasswing • https://www.anthropic.com/glasswing • Milla Jovovich creates MemPalace AI memory tool with “perfect score” on benchmark, but devs aren’t buying it https://cybernews.com/ai-news/milla-jovovich-mempalace-memory-tool/ https://github.com/milla-jovovich/mempalace https://www.instagram.com/reel/DWzNnqwD2Lu/
